description: Use this API to return integer branch parameters. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, ival = brnint(ibus,jbus,ickt,string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the branch quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Number of owners for this branch.
Owner number of the first owner.
Owner number of the second owner.
Owner number of the third owner.
Owner number of the fourth owner.
Bus IBUS substation number (returned as 0 if bus IBUS is not in a substation).
Bus JBUS substation number (returned as 0 if bus JBUS is not in a substation).
Bus IBUS bus section number (returned as 0 if bus IBUS is not in a substation).
Bus JBUS bus section number (returned as 0 if bus JBUS is not in a substation).
Number of the node to which the branch is connected at the bus IBUS end (returned as 0 if bus IBUS is not in a substation).
Number of the node to which the branch is connected at the bus JBUS end (returned as 0 if bus JBUS is not in a substation).
System switching device type (returned as 0 if the branch is not a system switching device).

error_codes.description: For ‘STRING’ = ‘OWNn’, n > number of owners; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
